completed_tasks.name: Convert feature libraries from SWC to TSC executor
completed_tasks.progress: Updated project.json files for all 8 feature libraries (auth, financial, habits, health, hobbies, notes, subscription, tasks) and 3 core libraries (shared-kernel, data-access, shared-types) to use @nx/js:tsc executor instead of @nx/js:swc

completed_tasks.name: Fix Zod v4 breaking changes
completed_tasks.progress: Updated z.record(z.unknown()) to z.record(z.string(), z.unknown()) in health.schema.ts, hobbies.schema.ts, notes.schema.ts, and ai.schema.ts

completed_tasks.name: Fix error handling for unknown error types
completed_tasks.progress: Updated email.service.ts to use proper type guards: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)

completed_tasks.name: Add FastifyReply type declarations
completed_tasks.progress: Created libs/feature-auth/src/types/fastify.d.ts with setCookie and clearCookie method declarations

completed_tasks.name: Update tsconfig.base.json
completed_tasks.progress: Added declaration: true to enable declaration file generation

remaining_tasks.name: Resolve @nx/js/typescript plugin interference
remaining_tasks.details: The Nx TypeScript plugin (@nx/js/typescript) is configured in nx.json and automatically creates build targets using SWC executor, overriding the project.json configurations. Need to either disable the plugin for specific projects or work within its constraints.

remaining_tasks.name: Verify decorator metadata preservation
remaining_tasks.details: Original goal was to ensure NestJS decorator metadata is preserved. The .swcrc files already have decoratorMetadata: true, so SWC may be sufficient. Need to test runtime behavior.

remaining_tasks.name: Run typecheck validation
remaining_tasks.details: When running typecheck, there are still module resolution issues with @pms/data-access, @pms/shared-kernel, and @prisma/client exports. These need to be resolved.

blockers.workaround: The plugin creates automatic build targets using SWC. Options: 1) Remove plugin configuration for specific projects, 2) Accept SWC with .swcrc decorator metadata config, 3) Use typecheck target for validation
Paths in tsconfig.base.json may not be working with composite builds. Need to investigate project references setup.
Need to regenerate Prisma client or check Prisma schema configuration

decisions.decision: Convert from SWC to TSC executor for decorator metadata support
decisions.rationale: User reported that SWC with skipTypeCheck: true doesn't preserve decorator metadata properly for NestJS dependency injection

decisions.decision: Keep .swcrc files with decorator metadata enabled
decisions.rationale: If we continue using SWC via the plugin, the existing .swcrc configuration already has decoratorMetadata: true
To automatically fix TypeScript project reference issues

next_action: Decide on approach: either disable @nx/js/typescript plugin for projects needing TSC, or accept SWC with .swcrc decorator metadata configuration and use typecheck target for validation. Then run full typecheck to identify remaining issues.
context_notes: Work was triggered by user request to: 1) Use @nx/js:tsc executor instead of SWC for feature-auth (preserves decorators better), 2) Investigate SWC configuration for decorator metadata, 3) Run /gsd:pause-work. Discovered that the Nx TypeScript plugin architecture makes executor switching complex. The .swcrc files already have proper decorator metadata configuration. The real issue may have been skipTypeCheck: true masking type errors, which we've now fixed (Zod v4, error handling, Fastify types).
